summary_text: ### 修正対象 - `/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/tests/run-all.sh` - `/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/tests/test-bridge-failover.mjs` - `/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/tests/test-bridge-guard.mjs` - `/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/tests/test-bridge-smoke.mjs` - `/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/tests/test-execute-smoke.mjs` - `/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/tests/test-lib-completion.mjs` - `/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/tests/test-lib-guard.mjs` - `/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/tests/test-lib-run-state.mjs` - `/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/tests/test-lib-sovereignty.mjs` ### 修正内容（diff形式） ```diff --- /dev/null +++ scripts/tests/run-all.sh @@ -0,0 +1,9 @@ +#!/bin/bash +set -e +PASS=0; FAIL=0; DIR=$(dirname "$0") +for f in "$DIR"/test-*.mjs; do + echo "Running $f..." + if node --test "$f" 2>&1; then PASS=$((PASS+1)); else FAIL=$((FAIL+1)); fi +done +echo "Results: $PASS passed, $FAIL failed" +[ $FAIL -eq 0 ] && exit 0 || exit 1 --- /dev/null +++ scripts/tests/test-bridge-failover.mjs @@ -0,0 +1,25 @@ +import test from 'node:test'; +import assert from 'node:assert/strict'; +import { spawnSync } from 'node:child_process'; +import { createRequire } from 'node:module'; +import { mkdtempSync } from 'node:fs'; +import os from 'node:os'; +import path from 'node:path'; +import { fileURLToPath } from 'node:url'; + +const require = createRequire(import.meta.url); +const { isFailoverEligible } = require('../lib/failover.js'); +const dir = path.dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url)); +const lib = path.join(dir, '..', 'lib', 'failover.js'); + +test('getFailoverChain returns codex to glm mapping', () => { + const home = mkdtempSync(path.join(os.tmpdir(), 'failover-')); + const code = `const {getFailoverChain}=require(${JSON.stringify(lib)});console.log(JSON.stringify(getFailoverChain("codex","architect")));`; + const res = spawnSync(process.execPath, ['-e', code], { encoding: 'utf8', env: { ...process.env, HOME: home } }); + assert.deepEqual(JSON.parse(res.stdout), [{ provider: 'glm', agent: 'general-reviewer' }]); +}); + +test('isFailoverEligible is true for codex-like failure and false for unknown providers', () => { + assert.equal(isFailoverEligible({ exitCode: 1, provider: 'codex' }), true); + assert.equal(isFailoverEligible({ provider: 'unknown' }), false); +}); --- /dev/null +++ scripts/tests/test-bridge-guard.mjs @@ -0,0 +1,33 @@ +import test from 'node:test'; +import assert from 'node:assert/strict'; +import { spawnSync } from 'node:child_process'; +import { mkdtempSync, mkdirSync, writeFileSync } from 'node:fs'; +import os from 'node:os'; +import path from 'node:path'; +import { fileURLToPath } from 'node:url'; + +const dir = path.dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url)); +const lib = path.join(dir, '..', 'lib', 'guard.js'); +const evalGuard = (code, home) => spawnSync(process.execPath, ['-e', code], { encoding: 'utf8', env: { ...process.env, HOME: home } }); + +test('validateDiversity covers lane/provider thresholds', () => { + const code = `const g=require(${JSON.stringify(lib)});const cfg={lanes:{min_active_lanes:2,min_distinct_providers:2}};console.log(JSON.stringify([g.validateDiversity([{provider:"codex"}],cfg),g.validateDiversity([{provider:"codex"},{provider:"glm"},{provider:"codex"}],cfg),g.validateDiversity([],cfg)]));`; + const res = evalGuard(code, mkdtempSync(path.join(os.tmpdir(), 'guard-'))); + const [one, three, zero] = JSON.parse(res.stdout); + assert.equal(one.ok, false); + assert.equal(three.ok, true); + assert.equal(zero.ok, false); +}); + +test('validatePhaseEvidence handles empty and complete evidence', () => { + const home = mkdtempSync(path.join(os.tmpdir(), 'guard-')); + const state = path.join(home, '.claude', 'state'); + mkdirSync(state, { recursive: true }); + write...
